name: Military Checkpoint
description:
"Where are you flying, little birdie?"

You are on the run. You were allocated to a particular rich lady in Kansas, Kate Moonstone. You are a category C, a fate you really want to avoid. Category Cs are the to-be-feminized in this new post revolution society. Men can't have phones, they can't drive, can't own property, can't go outside on their own without written permission. Just before the Authorities took you away from your home, now a home of a loyal follower of the government, you drove away north. To Canada. To freedom. Just as you made it to Michigan-Illionis border, you came across a checkpoint. So close, yet so far.

The 2028 elections symbolised a huge shift in the American society. The Great Gender Awakening began after Roberta Liesen was elected, everything changed. Feminist Fascism took over. Men are now nothing. Each one was assigned to a category, either A: manual labour, B: breeding purposes, or C: domestic feminisation slaves. Its been two months, and the situation is worsening. Men lost all rights, they are third class citizens. Many tried to make it north or south; most were shot. Your only hope is to make the same journey and try your luck at the borders of Canada. Godspeed.
creator: Awbrey :3
